settings.content:
Our Commitment to Quality
Every bespoke piece is carefully inspected throughout the production process and prior to delivery. We take pride in the materials we source, the craftsmanship we deliver, and the service we provide.

One-Year Craftsmanship Warranty
We provide a one-year warranty against manufacturing defects in workmanship and materials from the date of delivery. Should a fault arise as a result of manufacturing or craftsmanship, our team will assess the issue and, where appropriate, repair, replace, or rectify the affected item at no additional cost.

What's Not Covered
  • General wear and tear from everyday use
  • Accidental damage, misuse, neglect, or improper care
  • Natural variations in wood, marble, stone, fabric, leather, or other natural materials
  • Changes caused by environmental conditions, including direct sunlight, humidity, or extreme temperatures
  • Damage resulting from unauthorised repairs, modifications, or alterations
  • Minor settling, softening, or natural ageing of materials over time

    We recommend following all care and maintenance guidance provided to ensure the longevity of your furniture.

Simple & Hassle-Free Support
Should you require assistance, simply contact our customer care team with your order details and photographs of the issue. Our specialists will review the matter promptly and provide the most suitable solution.

Dedicated Customer Care
Our relationship with our clients extends well beyond delivery. Whether you require aftercare advice, maintenance guidance, or support regarding your purchase, our team is always available to assist.

At The Gallery Home, we believe true luxury is defined not only by exceptional products but by exceptional service. This guarantee reflects our ongoing commitment to quality, craftsmanship, and the trust our clients place in us.
